name: React & TypeScript Masterclass
description: Build production-ready apps with React 18 and TypeScript. Covers hooks, context, performance optimization, and testing.

name: Python for Data Science
description: Master NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib and Scikit-learn. Real-world projects from EDA to building ML pipelines.

name: UI/UX Design Foundations
description: Learn user-centred design principles, wireframing in Figma, usability testing, and building a complete design system.

name: Node.js & Express Backend
description: Build scalable REST APIs with Node.js, Express, JWT authentication, MongoDB integration, and deployment on cloud platforms.

name: Machine Learning A-Z
description: Comprehensive ML course covering supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, NLP, and model deployment.

name: iOS App Development with Swift
description: Build native iOS apps from scratch using Swift, SwiftUI, and Xcode. Publish your own app to the App Store.

name: AWS Cloud Practitioner
description: Prepare for the AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner exam. Covers core AWS services, security, pricing, and architecture.

name: Figma Advanced Prototyping
description: Master advanced Figma features: auto-layout, components, variables, interactive prototypes, and developer handoff.

name: Docker & Kubernetes DevOps
description: Containerise applications with Docker, orchestrate with Kubernetes, and set up full CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions.

name: Android Development with Kotlin
description: Build modern Android apps with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, ViewModel, Room database, and Material Design 3.

name: Full-Stack Next.js Development
description: Ship production apps with Next.js 14, App Router, Server Components, Prisma ORM, and Vercel deployment strategies.

name: Data Visualisation with Power BI
description: Create stunning dashboards and business reports with Power BI. Covers DAX, Power Query, and publishing to the web.

name: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Understand ethical hacking, network security, OWASP Top 10, penetration testing basics, and security best practices.

name: Ethical Hacking & Penetration Testing
description: Hands-on pen testing with Kali Linux, Metasploit, Burp Suite. Learn to think like an attacker to defend systems.

name: Motion Design with After Effects
description: Create scroll-stopping motion graphics, animated logos, kinetic typography, and UI micro-interactions for digital products.

name: GraphQL API Design
description: Design and build production GraphQL APIs with Apollo Server, type safety, subscriptions, and federated microservices.

name: Flutter Cross-Platform Apps
description: Build beautiful cross-platform apps for iOS and Android from a single Dart codebase using Flutter and Riverpod.
